accessibility.text: Our camera work will be a blend of handheld realism and cinematic beauty. We're observers, capturing life as it unfolds, yet doing so with an artistic eye that elevates the everyday into something extraordinary. The camera is our tool to bring the viewer into the heart of the story, making them feel part of the world we're creating.
Camera will be very sensitive to the detail.  And will describe the world  with one poetic tenderness more usual for the art-house cinema than the commercial world.
Camera will be most of the time  handheld.
The product and beauty shots will be high speed.
